revision.comment: Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1234805678|1234805678]] by [[Special:Contributions/Antiquistik|Antiquistik]] ([[User talk:Antiquistik|talk]]) This has already been reverted once, as it's a poor choice of font.
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
